devicesSubtitle: Clients that have connected to this server. Rows appear automatically when a RustDesk client points its ID/Relay here — you don't add devices manually. Metadata (hostname, platform, version) populates from the client's own sysinfo or the hbbs sync; a freshly-connected client can take up to ~30s to fill in. Auto-refreshes every 30s.
joinTokensSubtitle: Single-use invite tokens for onboarding a new device's RustDesk client. Not the same as Personal Access Tokens in Settings → API tokens (those are for API scripts). Each invite is shown in plaintext exactly once — copy it immediately.
haveInvitation: Have an invitation? Open join page →
